text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser and I are taking a walk when
we spot Rice Shower looking distressed.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: What's wrong, Rice? Something happen?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh, um... The vending machine won't give me the
drink I paid for.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I-it's probably my fault... What if it broke because
I tried to buy something?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Say no more. I'll have it fixed up in a jiffy!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It'll be fine! I fixed the TV back home once when
the picture cut out!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
B-but... this is all my fault. You shouldn't have to
do anything...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
It's really no trouble. Here, let's see if we can't
cheer up this grumpy old machine!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
There, there, my sweet vending machine. Did
something upset you?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
You must be awfully tired, working so hard with
no time off... Say, would you like to nibble on a
battery?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Go on, no need to be shy! It's a reward for all
your hard work!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Okay... now it's time to cough up that drink!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: U-um...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Huh... I'm pretty sure I just did this a bunch of
times until the TV started working again.
choice_data_list:
Maybe it was just a coincidence it started
working...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: What?! You think?! Well, I guess that's possible...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
That just means I just have to keep trying things
until it's fixed. Mun!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
You really don't need to do any more. I'm sorry
for wasting your time, okay? I'll try and figure
something out on my own!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing for you to be sorry about! If
anything, I'm having a lot of fun!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: You're having... fun?

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Everything about me's so ordinary that it gets my
heart racing when this sorta unusual stuff
happens!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: So honestly, thanks for the chance!

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: N-no, I should be thanking you. Not only are you trying to fix the vending machine, you're being so kind...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Tannhauser.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hey, it's all good! Now, let's get back to fixing
this machine!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Hmm. Maybe I should try a different approach.
Something with some oomph...

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Lend us your brains! Give me something
with oomph!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Trainer! Lend us your brains! Give me something
with oomph!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
So I should show the vending machine even more
love?! Gotcha! Here goes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Are you really okay like this, my little
vendy-wendy machine? If you're not gonna start
working now, then when?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Um, uh... You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, nice assist, Rice!
How about it, vending machine? Are you getting
the urge to spring into action?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Oh, my... Why are the two of you speaking to
that vending machine?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Tazuna, who happened to be passing by, plugs in
the vending machine's power cord, instantly
breathing electrical life back into it.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: What?! You mean it wasn't broken?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text:
Wait, just give me another chance. I'm going to
unleash my secret weapon.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Just stay right there!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Matikanetannhauser just went racing by me... Did
something happen?

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Well, the thing is...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
There—it should be fine now. Maybe someone
tripped over the power cord and accidentally
unplugged it.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
Oh... So it wasn't broken after all. Someone
should tell Tannhauser...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Several minutes later, Matikanetannhauser comes
back with a huge bundle of tools.

text_block_list.name: Matikanetannhauser
text_block_list.text: Wait, you already fixed it?!
